Class AbstractProverCore<P extends ProofObject<G>, G extends @Nullable ProofGoal<G>>

java.lang.Object
org.key_project.prover.engine.AbstractProverCore<P,G>
All Implemented Interfaces:
ProverCore<P,G>
Direct Known Subclasses:
DefaultProver
public abstract class AbstractProverCore<P extends ProofObject<G>, G extends @Nullable ProofGoal<G>> extends Object implements ProverCore<P,G>
Common class for provers which takes care of listener registration and task event propagation.

    countApplied

      number of rules automatically applied

  • Constructor Details

    • AbstractProverCore

      public AbstractProverCore()

  • Method Details

    • fireTaskStarted

      protected void fireTaskStarted(TaskStartedInfo startedInfo)
      propagation method for the event that a task started
      Parameters:
      startedInfo - an information object describing the started task (may contain, for example, the maximal number of steps to be performed by the current task)

    • fireTaskProgress

      protected void fireTaskProgress()
      propagation of task progress information to be displayed e.g. in a progress bar

    • fireTaskFinished

      protected void fireTaskFinished(TaskFinishedInfo info)
      propagation method for the event that a task has finished
      Parameters:
      info - an information object about the work done by the task e.g. number of applied rules

    • addProverTaskObserver

      public void addProverTaskObserver(ProverTaskListener observer)
      adds a listener to the prover
      Specified by:
      addProverTaskObserver in interface ProverCore<P extends ProofObject<G>, G extends @Nullable ProofGoal<G>>
      Parameters:
      observer - the listener

    • removeProverTaskObserver

      public void removeProverTaskObserver(ProverTaskListener observer)
      removes a listener from the prover
      Specified by:
      removeProverTaskObserver in interface ProverCore<P extends ProofObject<G>, G extends @Nullable ProofGoal<G>>
      Parameters:
      observer - the listener
